title: Kanne Kalaimane Lyrics Moondram Pirai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kanne Kalaimaanae
kanni mayilena
kandaen unai naaney

andhi pagal
unai naan parkien
aandavanai idhaithana
ketkiren

raariraroae oraariroe
raariraroae oraariroe

Kanne Kalaimaanae
kanni mayilena
kandaen unai naaney

Oomai endraal
oruvagai amaidhi
aezhai endraal
adhil oru amaidhi

neeyo kilippedu
panpaadum aanandha
kyil paedu

yeno deivam 
sadhi seidhadhu
pedhai pola
vidhi seidhadhu

Kanne Kalaimaanae ..

kadhal kondaen
kanavinai valarthaen
kanmani unai naan
karuthinil niraithaen

unakae uyiraanen
ennaalum enai nee
maravaadhe

neeyillaamal 
edhu nimmadhi
neethaan ini
en sannidhi

Kanne Kalaimaanae ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kanne Kalaimane?

The song conveys themes of love, longing, and the beauty of simple moments.

Who composed the music for Moondram Pirai?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who sang Kanne Kalaimane?

The song was sung by the renowned playback singer K. J. Yesudas.

What is the significance of the song in the movie?

The song reflects the emotional bond and the poignant moments shared between the lead characters.

When was Moondram Pirai released?

The movie was released in 1982.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kanne Kalaimane is a beautifully composed song from the film Moondram Pirai, capturing the essence of love and longing. The song is set against the backdrop of a poignant relationship between the lead characters, portrayed by Kamal Haasan and Sridevi. Ilaiyaraaja's soothing melody combined with K. J. Yesudas's soulful voice and Kannadasan's evocative lyrics create an unforgettable experience. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kanne Kalaimane from the iconic film Moondram Pirai is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voice of K. J. Yesudas and the legendary composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song remains etched in the hearts of Tamil cinema lovers. Experience the magic of Kannadasan's poignant lyrics that beautifully convey deep emotions.
